flashcards.definition: x = f(t), y = g(t); the curve is traced as t varies.
Solve one equation for t and substitute into the other.
The direction the curve is traced as t increases.
x = r cosθ, y = r sinθ traces a circle of radius r.
x = x₀ + at, y = y₀ + bt traces a line through (x₀, y₀) with direction ⟨a, b⟩.
